title: Conformal Reliability Envelopes for Secure OPF Under Forecast Shift
reasoning: Original Semantic Scholar retrieval produced only limited evidence and was partially affected by 429 failures.
Backup arXiv/OpenAlex retrieval returned OPF, renewable uncertainty, demand response, smart grid, and resilience candidates.

The title-level evidence does not show an exact duplicate of conformal reliability envelopes embedded into security-constrained OPF, but it does show that adjacent OPF-under-uncertainty and renewable/demand-response literature exists.

Because the proposal's novelty depends on the specific combination of conformal prediction, network-aware uncertainty sets, and secure OPF/reserve activation, title-level backup evidence is insufficient for a final novelty=True decision.
key_related_candidates: AC optimal power flow in the presence of renewable sources and uncertain loads
hynet: An Optimal Power Flow Framework for Hybrid AC/DC Power Systems
Online Algorithm for Demand Response with Inelastic Demands and Apparent Power Constraint
Data-driven Coordination of Distributed Energy Resources for Active Power Provision
Microgrids: A review, outstanding issues and future trends
A Survey on State Estimation Techniques and Challenges in Smart Distribution Systems
recommended_next_step: Run a domain-specific search for conformal prediction + OPF + chance constraints + distributionally robust OPF, ideally with IEEE/OpenAlex filters and abstract-level review.
